title: ChatMessageEntry and ChatMessagePush lack #[non_exhaustive]: spec fields may expand
description: The project coding rules require #[non_exhaustive] on types that mirror spec-defined sets. ChatMessageEntry and ChatMessagePush are spec-defined payload types that could gain fields in future spec revisions. Without #[non_exhaustive], adding a field in a later spec revision is a breaking change for any code that matches on the struct. ChatPushConfig has the same issue. Compare with ChatCapability in jmap.rs which also lacks it — this is a consistent gap, but these new types are a good place to start.
